markdown:
#  What is the difference between accepting a Procore Invitation and creating a Free Procore Company Account? 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Answer 
Procore offers two distinct methods for accessing the platform. Both require you to set up a user login so that you can log in to Procore.
  1. **Accepting an invitation** from an existing Procore company account.
     * You are an employee of the company and have been invited to log in to Procore.
     * You are a collaborator of the company and have been invited to work on the company's projects in Procore.
  2. **Creating a free Procore Company account** for your construction business where you can manage your team, company information, and business profile, as well as the bids your company has been invited to. You can also access projects where you are a collaborator for other Procore company accounts.


Below, we'll guide you through the differences in these processes to help you choose the right path for your needs.
##  Steps 
### Accept an Invitation From an existing Procore Company
Respond to an invitation from your employer or a business partner to join their Procore organization as a user.
  1. Open the welcome email.
  2. If you are brand new to Procore, click **Get Started**.  
_Note_ : If you have used Procore for a project in the past and already have a password, click **Login**. Then continue with [How to Log in to Procore Web (app.procore.com)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/log-in-to-procore-web).
  3. Enter a password in the **Password** field.   
The password must meet the following requirements: 
     * Procore's Password Requirements:
       * Eight (8) or more characters
       * At least one (1) uppercase letter
       * At least one (1) lowercase letter
       * At least one (1) number
       * At least one (1) special character (!@#$%^&*)
       * Passwords must match
       * You cannot reuse your last four (4) passwords
  4. As your password begins meeting the password requirements, the circles next to the requirements are marked.  
_Note_ : In the image below, the password still needs a special character.  
  
![Create A Password Requirements](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0c06ffafb229a87a31c2fa374f8365b1/ea342b8b94393ceacea1aec40a5f1d69/create-a-password-requirements.png?fm=webp)
  5. Enter the same password again in the **Confirm** field.
  6. If you want to subscribe to Procore's Construction Newsletter and receive information about product updates, mark the checkbox.
  7. Click **Set Password**.   
The system will log you into Procore using your email address and new password.


### Create a Free Procore Company Account
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
Create your company's free Procore Company Account to unlock various features, such as viewing and accessing Procore projects and bids, managing your team and business profile, and more.
#####  Important
When creating a free Procore Company account, there is a waiting period while Procore verifies your company information. See [How are businesses approved to be listed on the Procore Construction Network?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-are-businesses-approved-to-be-listed-on-the-procore-construction-network)
  1. Click [here](https://www.procore.com/network/signup) to open the signup page.  
_Note:_ You can also click **Sign Up** from the [Procore Construction Network](https://www.procore.com/network) page.
  2. On the **Name and Email** page, enter the following information:
     * **First Name**
     * **Last Name**
     * **Company Email Address**
  3. If you do not yet have a Procore Login, follow these steps:
    1. From your email, click the link to verify your email address.
    2. Enter your password and mark the checkbox after you review the 'Privacy Notice' and 'User Terms of Service'. Then click **Continue to Login**.
  4. Log in to Procore using your company email address and password.
  5. Enter information about your company and click **Search**.
  6. Review the matching companies.
     * If one of the companies matches your company, follow these steps:
       * Click **Request to Join** next to your company.
       * Select your role from the dropdown list.
       * Mark the checkbox if you would like to receive updates from Procore.
       * Click **Submit**.
     * If none of the companies match your company, follow these steps:
       * Enter your company's information.
       * Mark the checkbox if you would like to receive updates from Procore.
       * Click **Create Account**.

title: What is the difference between accepting a Procore Invitation and creating a Free Procore Company Account?
description: An explanation of the difference between accepting an invitation to Procore and creating a free Procore company account.
